name: llm-coding-benchmark
description: A dependency-free harness for comparing coding-model responses.

scripts.check: node --check run-benchmark.mjs && node --check run-repeats.mjs && node --check export-public-results.mjs && node --check summarize-repeats.mjs && node --check scripts/scan-secrets.mjs && node --check src/harness.mjs && node --check src/models.mjs && node --check src/public-results.mjs && node --check src/statistics.mjs && node --check src/providers/index.mjs && node --check src/providers/ncode.mjs
